name: Toffee Fondue
recipeIngredient: Angel food cake, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the caramels, milk, coffee, and chocolate chips in the top of a double boiler.
2. Cook over boiling water, stirring occasionally, until all ingredients are melted and well blended.
3. Transfer the mixture to a fondue pot.
4. Spear fruits, marshmallows, and cake pieces on fondue forks and dip them into the fondue.
